title: schoenoplectus ohwianus
intro: Schoenoplectus ohwianus, also known as Ohwia bulrush, is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family, Cyperaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting respiratory health. Schoenoplectus ohwianus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and applications.
